info.name: SEKAR API
info.description:
SEKAR (Sistem Evaluasi Kerja Satgas RTH) - Complete API Collection

## Overview
- **Total Endpoints:** 37
- **Authentication:** JWT Bearer Token
- **Base URL:** http://localhost:3000/api/v1

## Test Users
- admin / admin123 (Admin)
- supervisor1 / supervisor123 (Supervisor)
- worker1,2,3 / worker123 (Worker)

## Collection Structure
- 00. Health Check
- 01. Authentication
- 02. Users Management
- 03. Area Types
- 04. Areas Management
- 05. Worker Assignments
- 06. Shifts - Worker Flow
- 07. Shifts - Supervisor View
- 08. Reports - Worker Flow
- 09. Reports - Admin/Supervisor
- 10. Location Tracking
- 11. Supervisor Dashboard
